Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /fcmetrics to open the window.
Changelog:
Main panel update:
- Contained the rotating FC information text in a dark blue rounded panel.
- Extended each information item hold to 7 seconds.
- Highlighted numeric values in gold.
